Valsuani fixes: (1) Em-dashes were already fixed on live site, JSON export was stale. Always check live content before assuming issues from exports. (2) Custom API PUT on /topic-pages with full payload including qa_items works for QA updates. The /pages/{id}/faq endpoint returns 404 for topic_page post types. (3) Evidence items created via POST /evidence with parent_detail_id correctly links them in the sync/hierarchy endpoint, even though the /details/{id} individual endpoint shows 0 evidence. (4) Content updates via standard WP REST API POST work fine for appending sections. (5) The pattern of writing new evidence items for the same documents from a different analytical perspective (authentication vs myth debunking) is more valuable than duplicating content.
